title: Snail's Pace
description: A lightweight modpack with QOL, performance, and worldgen mods!
body:
This is a curated selection of mods for use with the included server files, but was originally crafted to play with my friends! It's a specially selected list of performance mods and vanilla+, with a few worldgen and progression changes.

Some of the major notes are:

- Betternether and Betterend, and Oh The Biomes You'll Go, to change every dimension into something refreshing.

- Yung's suite of world generation on the server, for better adventuring

- A number of QOL mods, such as EMI, voice chat, Journeymap, mousetweaks, and more!

- Shader support with Iris, and even comes preloaded with the Complementary Shaderpacks!

- Lots of performance tweaks, major inspiration from modpacks like Fabulously Optimized.
